text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after a bout of heavy rain, I go to check
in about the status of the track with a staff
member I'm acquainted with, when...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Might we have a moment of your
time?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes, of course. We were just finishing up our
conversation. I'll be off, then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait! We're actually hoping to speak with you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're in charge of taking care of the training
track, yes? Would it be all right if we asked you a
few questions?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'm guessing yesterday's rain has you two
worried, huh?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
It really poured out here, didn't it? But you don't
have to worry. It's totally fine to use it today!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can see that, but that's why it's so terribly
strange!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You see, yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't appear like the rain will stop. I wonder
if it'll be dry enough to train on by tomorrow
morning.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We'll just have to come check! At the very least,
we'll be able to do stretches!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We didn't have our hopes up, so we were
surprised how pristine and dry the track was! It
was like yesterday's rain never even happened!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Well, it wasn't all dry this morning, but I
finished up the job with some elbow grease.
Gotta keep the track ready for everyone, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you mean you dried it off manually?! But
when?! It was already completely dry early this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's diligent athletes like you who come
out at the crack of dawn to practice. You
motivate me to work just as hard.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
That's why I always make sure to wrap up my
morning routine before the grounds open for the
day.
choice_data_list: You sure have your work cut out for you!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I won't argue with that. But it's all of you
who make my job worth doing.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Running in the competition of your dreams
against your rivals...

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
If waking up a little earlier than normal means I
can help you all achieve your goals, then I'm more
than happy to do so.
choice_data_list: I understand that feeling very well.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um! Do you mind if I ask one more question?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What made you decide to work at Tracen
Academy instead of the racecourses that hold
those competitions we all dream of?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text: Well, that's because...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Trainer! Because of you, I was
finally able to realize my dream!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that racer crying in joy at her moment of
triumph moved me. It made me wonder just how
hard she had to work to reach her goal.

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
The more I thought of it, the more restless I
became. I wanted to do all I could to help racers
fulfill their dreams, so I came here to Tracen!
choice_data_list: So that's what brought you here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing the staff member off, I come back to
find the two students with serious looks on their
faces.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I never considered how hard the staff worked to
support us.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I really feel I mustn't take their efforts for
granted, especially after that conversation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If only we could do something to show them our
appreciation...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just the maintenance staff we have to
thank either, is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right. There are also the cooks in the cafeteria
who make us such delicious meals every day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And also the custodians who keep the academy
nice and clean.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What if we did something for everyone to show
them our thanks?
choice_data_list: I'm sure they'd all be delighted.
I'm sure they'd all be delighted.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to start thinking of something right
away!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've realized the extent to which
everyone supports us, I want to make sure I
express my gratitude to all of them!
